channel.title: Webdev on programmerraja blog
channel.description: Recent content in Webdev on programmerraja blog

item.title: Sherlock Homes: The Case of the Missing Content Length
item.description: Running a website smoothly is akin to maintaining a finely-tuned machine. Yet, like any mystery tale, unexpected twists can disrupt the flow. Recently, our team faced a perplexing error while serving our website: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONTENT_LENGTH_MISMATCH in Chrome. Join us as we unravel this digital whodunit and uncover how we cracked the case, restoring our site’s seamless operation. Initial Clues It all started with user reports of intermittent loading issues on our website.
